Appointment as Registered Agent


October 30, 2024


RE: QUANTUM INNOVA PEOPLE INC

202410291835716


The business listed above has appointed you as their Registered Agent.


A registered agent serves as a business’s agent for service of process, notice, or demand required or permitted by law to be served on a business.


If this appointment was made without your consent, you may request to be removed as the registered agent by filing a Statement of Resignation of Registered Agent at http://www.INBiz.IN.gov. or by completing and submitting State Form 26285 – Statement of Resignation of Registered Agent (https://forms.in.gov/Download.aspx?id=4868) to the Secretary of State’s Office.

As provided in the Indiana statute, the appointment will continue for thirty-one (31) days after the effective date of the Registered Agent Resignation. Thereafter, the information will no longer appear online.

If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact our office at (317) 232-6576.


Sincerely,
BUSINESS SERVICES DIVISION"

The appointment remains effective for thirty-one days from the date of the notice.
